hero_section.subtitle: Software Engineer & IoT Integrator. I build scalable fullstack systems and bridge hardware with software: from session control architectures to autonomous robots with LoRa telemetry.

contact_section.title: Let's work together
contact_section.subtitle: Open to new projects, ideas or collaborations. Feel free to reach out.
contact_section.name: Name
contact_section.error_tryag: It could not be sent. Please try again in a few seconds

about_me_section.p1: I'm Jesús Manuel Pérez Guerra, Software Engineer & IoT Integrator. My technical journey started in 2020, and since 2023 I've been building production-grade systems at Geologistic: from concurrent session control architectures that protect revenue, to secure impersonation tools for QA and support teams.
about_me_section.p2: I specialize in fullstack development (React, Node.js, Django) while also bridging the physical world, designing systems with ESP32, Raspberry Pi, LoRa telemetry, MQTT, and custom PID algorithms. I enjoy solving critical business problems through scalable, offline-first architectures.
about_me_section.p3: My goal is to keep growing across the full stack of engineering: software, hardware, and everything in between. I also tutor university students in Data Structures, Algorithms, and OOP (Java/C).

2.name: Ruf - Assistance App
2.description: Multiplataform app (mobile & wearable) for service assistance in restaurants, malls, gyms, and events. Features a Walmart-style pickup flow, QR integration, and multi-device push notifications via a single API.

3.name: Geologistic ERP (Mobile)
3.description: Mobile ERP for logistics companies with concurrent session control, QR workflows, and multi-role permission systems. Integrates real-time data via WebSockets.

4.name: Geologistic ERP
4.description: Enterprise-grade ERP (Web & Mobile) with security architecture for concurrent device sessions: limiting to 1 web + 1 mobile active session to protect the SaaS monetization model. Integrates AWS for document management and third-party APIs for data pipelines.

5.name: RUF - Assistance Platform
5.description: Web management platform for RUF. Features real-time analytics dashboards, business operations management, and QR-driven pickup logistics. Built with WebSockets for live data synchronization.

6.name: Soundle
6.description: Wordle-style music game. A snippet of a song is played, and the user must guess what it is. Includes animations, hints, and visual feedback.

8.name: Ruf - Customer Assistance App (iOS)
8.description: Standalone Swift app for Apple Watch that notifies staff of customer requests in real time. Features OTP login, real-time sockets, push notifications via APNs, and read-delay analytics for business intelligence.
functionalities: Calculates notification read delay for analytics.

10.name: Flappy Bird
10.description: Flappy Bird game built in x86 Assembly language, with minimalist graphics via Raylib and C.

11.name: Baker's Game
11.description: Baker's Game card game, similar to Free Cell.

12.name: EJChat
12.description: Real-time social network with multimedia support and WebSocket communication. Implements progressive loading strategies and Docker/Redis infrastructure for scalable real-time messaging.

13.name: Ruf - Customer Assistance App (Android/WearOS)
13.description: React Native wearable app for WearOS. Notifies staff of customer requests with real-time alerts, OTP login, push notifications, and read-delay tracking for analytics.

m4.name: Gruas GZ - Inventory Management App
m4.description: Mobile CRM for vehicle inventory control in a towing company. Backend built with Node/Express + MySQL, deployed on a Linux server using PM2.

peerreview.name: Peer-Review PWA
peerreview.description: Academic peer-review platform designed with an offline-first architecture using IndexedDB and LWW (Last-Write-Wins) conflict resolution. Containerized with Docker, managing hybrid MongoDB/MariaDB databases and a REST API.

robot.name: Autonomous Navigation Robot
robot.description: Robot featuring speed, position, and orientation control via GPS waypoints. Integrates long-range LoRa telemetry with a monitoring dashboard that visualizes real-time 3D movement and current route on a map.
functionalities: LoRa telemetry: ESP32 emitter to receiver
Live route and location tracking on map (Leaflet)
PID control algorithms developed from scratch

djangopulse.name: django-pulse & pulse-rn
djangopulse.description: Open-source library pair for automating offline-first data sync engines in Django and React Native. Reduces technical boilerplate for data synchronization in mobile apps, enabling faster development of LWW-based sync patterns.
